candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Choose the description of the point on the distribution curve that is the most plausible.
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: Point C is proportional to temperature
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
选择最合理的描述分布曲线上各点的选项。

A. 点 A 表示系统处于最低能量状态。
B. 点 C 处的分布峰值对应于系统的最稳定状态。
C. 点 B 处的曲线区域对应于系统处于过渡状态。
D. 点 D 处的曲线区域对应于产物的分布。
metadata.explanation_zh: 根据动理论,在最大值略高处的 C 点,气体分子的平均动能与绝对温度成正比。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The graph is readable and clearly shows a kinetic-energy distribution with labeled positions A-D, so the image is usable and necessary. However, the original question is incomplete without its multiple-choice options; the sample becomes mostly understandable only through the rewritten variant that asks which labeled point corresponds to the stated relation, yielding Point C.
